text: Well Power Rangers and Sentai are some of the longest if not longest constantly running series of its kind. Kamen rider came first but there was a big hiatus in the 90's and the Showa era had several cancellations it isn't until post Kuuga that theres been a constant audience and Ultraman is even worse, with a brief revival with Tiga but pretty much dying around Cosmos. And power rangers has lasted longer than any kids shows aside from those in the days of Bozo and Mr. Rogers.
author: @aliastheabnormal

text: Cause they're the original power rangers before there was power rangers, see in the 70s, there was this action TV series in Japan called Gorangers, it eventually got so popular, it was made into a series of action series for each year, called "Super Sentai", then after 15 years after Gorangers release, Fox in USA found out about the latest series, Zyuranger, & made an American version of it for kids called "Power Rangers" while using action footage from those series for all these years.
author: @182supermario

text: The funny thing is that Power Rangers and Super Sentai Rangers keep getting that for each other, because newer generations have no idea which came first.
